perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women are standing in a warehouse store aisle, each holding a rolled-up Snoopy-themed double blanket—one white and one yellow. (2) The woman on the right, wearing a beret, gestures towards the Snoopy illustrations on the white blanket while the woman on the left holds the yellow version. (3) They continue to present the product's features, pointing at the dimensions and labels on the packaging. (4) The camera pans to show a large cardboard display box on the floor, overflowing with stacks of these blankets in both colors. (5) The shot returns to the two women holding the blankets together in a friendly, enthusiastic pose.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An enthusiastic female voice speaking Mandarin begins immediately, accompanied by upbeat, rhythmic electronic background music. (2) The narration remains fast-paced and high-energy as it describes the product's price, size, and washability. (3) Subtle ambient noise typical of a large warehouse retail space can be heard under the music and vocals. (4) The audio concludes with a final enthusiastic call to action as the music continues until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: "努比努比" (Nubi Nubi) in large colorful font. (2) Title text: "史努比雙人毯" (Snoopy Double Blanket). (3) Functional text: "359元 送禮不傷荷包" (359 TWD, a gift that doesn't hurt your wallet) and "152*177CM", "可以機洗" (Machine washable). (4) Descriptive text: "很有質感" (High quality texture) and "難怪" (No wonder). (5) Standard subtitles translating the spoken Mandarin dialogue.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Feature Highlight -> Store Inventory Proof -> Final Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female presenters appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman is wearing a light pink top with a white lace skirt; the other is wearing a purple off-the-shoulder ruffled top, a black skirt, and a blue beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A warehouse store interior (Costco) with high metal shelving units, cardboard shipping boxes, and various household products visible in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Presentation -> Inventory Proof -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote a specific bargain item (Snoopy double blanket) found at Costco, highlighting its low price (359 TWD), size, and attractive design to drive immediate purchase behavior among fans of the Peanuts franchise.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation of the product, price information, and specific retail location (Costco) while encouraging viewers to buy it.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-show style text overlays and fast-paced retail vlog narration.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes social proof by showing large quantities of the product in-store to suggest high demand and popularity.
